title: Refreshed UI !
description: A Resources pack focused on simple and elegant UIs.
body:
![Veack's Refreshed UI logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae53d610136d188ba3df62f0a18962a14e230ff1.png)

> Tired of the same old gray GUIs ? Then play with these fresh new looks for all of Minecraft containers ! 
 

 
![Crafting Table, Furnace & Brewing Stand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ac3242eeaf75240332d2f8384e45d55951beb0.png)

![Stone cutter, Anvil, Enchanting table, Loom & Dispenser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f3b3b960383f8f546ef772ed252666b9ccb8db.png)


---

![Progression](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/104c52d84a13513baf975d9b35f6ad88045fed5a.png)

This resources pack is still in Alpha, and there are still a lot of textures to do. Here's what the current version is replacing :

### Completed

- Anvil
- Beacon
- Blast Furnace
- Brewing Stand
- Cartography Table
- Crafter
- Furnace
- Grindstone
- Smithing Table
- Smoker
   
   
- Hotbar & Crosshair !
- Font ! (requires extra)
 
### To-do
 
- Crafting table 50%
- Dispenser 50%
- Enchanting Table 50%
- Chest & Double Chest 50%
- Hopper 50%
- Horse 50%
- Inventory & Creative Inventory 50%
- Loom 75%
- Shulker Box 50%
- Stonecutter 50%
- Villager Trading 50%

*All base sprites are completed. The percentage represents extra sprites, like error arrows, buttons, sliders, etc.*
